name: dorkos-community
description: Official community marketplace for DorkOS — agents, plugins, skill packs, and adapters

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews your PRs every weekday morning, posts findings to Slack, files Linear issues for blockers

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Weekly dependency vulnerability scans, secret detection, and license compliance audits

plugins.name: docs-keeper
plugins.description: Watches code changes, suggests documentation updates, keeps READMEs in sync with reality

plugins.name: linear-integration
plugins.description: Linear status dashboard extension and webhook adapter for issue notifications

plugins.name: posthog-monitor
plugins.description: PostHog dashboard widget and error alerting for your DorkOS sidebar

plugins.name: security-audit-pack
plugins.description: Scheduled security audit tasks: dependency scanning, secret detection, license checks

plugins.name: release-pack
plugins.description: Tasks for version bumping, changelog generation, and git tagging

plugins.name: discord-adapter
plugins.description: Discord relay adapter — bridge agent messages to Discord channels and DMs
